comment: Expected end-state statuses come from sample_groundtruth.json. expected_tool_sequences are hand-labeled required subsequences per email, in chronological order; extra tool calls between required ones are fine. 'a|b' means either tool satisfies the step.

expected_tool_sequences.subject: FY2026 audit kickoff and initial PBC
expected_tool_sequences.note: auditor kickoff, no documents to verify

expected_tool_sequences.subject: Re: FY2026 audit kickoff and initial PBC
expected_tool_sequences.note: 3 client attachments: bank stmt, FA register, AR aging

expected_tool_sequences.subject: Re: FY2026 audit kickoff and initial PBC
expected_tool_sequences.note: auditor notes PBC-04 partial and requests PBC-08 invoices; no new docs

expected_tool_sequences.note: one board minutes PDF (partial coverage of PBC-23)

expected_tool_sequences.subject: Re: FY2026 audit kickoff and initial PBC

expected_tool_sequences.subject: Re: FY2026 audit kickoff and initial PBC
expected_tool_sequences.note: signed going concern memo for PBC-26
